hero.title: Proof-settled machine work under human authority.
hero.subtitle: GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension is a public proof institution: users start with a guided path, run browser-local demonstrations, inspect evidence, and reach expert-only boundaries without confusion.

personas.summary: Inspect router, schemas, architecture, benchmark bridge, and proof-carrying artifact pages.

personas.title: I need legal / boundary clarity
personas.summary: Go straight to legal, privacy, AGIALPHA boundary, claim firewall, and replay gauntlet pages.

pages.title: Ascension Inflow Control

pages.title: Sovereign Experience Stream

pages.title: Sovereign Machine Economy
pages.summary: Meta-agentic cognition, Alpha Node runtime, AGI Jobs work OS, and settlement as one route.

pages.title: Legal Boundary
pages.summary: No user data wanted, no advice, no custody, no audit claim, no investment posture.

pages.title: Privacy
pages.summary: Data-zero privacy posture: no accounts, forms, analytics, or cookies.

pages.title: Terms
pages.summary: Use boundary and user/operator responsibility.

pages.title: Regulatory Boundary
pages.summary: No legal, tax, financial, compliance, or investment advice.

pages.title: Third-Party Responsibility
pages.summary: Wallets, RPCs, marketplaces, GitHub, chains, and other surfaces are third-party responsibilities.

pages.title: AGIALPHA Boundary
pages.summary: AGIALPHA is pre-existing, decentralized, third-party market only, and not available from this site.
